title: Highly multiplexed spatial transcriptomics in bacteria.
author: Sarfatis A Wang Y Twumasi-Ankrah N Moffitt JR
content: S-EPMC12278067 PMC12278067 Highly multiplexed spatial transcriptomics in bacteria. Single-cell decisions made in complex environments underlie many bacterial phenomena. Image-based transcriptomics approaches offer an avenue to study such behaviors, yet these approaches have been hindered
